# Attend Xpress

> Attend Xpress is an all-in-one staff attendance, HR and payroll platform built for businesses in Nepal. Employees clock in by scanning QR codes, field teams are tracked live on a map, and payroll runs on the Bikram Sambat (Nepali) calendar — across multiple branches, in English or Nepali. Built by Zentara Labs.

Attend Xpress helps organisations in Nepal replace paper registers, spreadsheets and expensive biometric hardware with a phone-based system that works for office, retail, multi-branch and field-based teams.

## What it does

- **QR code attendance**: Staff clock in and out by scanning a workplace QR code from the mobile app. Rotating QR codes prevent buddy-punching.
- **Live field staff tracking**: Admins see the real-time GPS location of field employees on a map while they are on the clock.
- **Route replay**: Replay the full route a field employee travelled during a shift, including detected stops (where they stopped and for how long).
- **Payroll & payslips**: Calculate salaries, allowances and deductions, run a Process → Approve → Mark-paid approval workflow, and generate payslips.
- **Leave management**: Staff request leave; managers approve it in one place with balances tracked automatically.
- **Multi-branch & geofencing**: Run multiple branches, each with its own geofence, admins and schedules.
- **Roster & shift planning**: Plan shifts and assign working schedules.
- **Bikram Sambat calendar**: Attendance, holidays, leave and payroll all work in the Nepali (BS) calendar. UI available in English and Nepali.
- **Reports & exports**: Generate and export attendance and payroll reports.
- **Notifications, document management and a full audit log.**

## Who it is for

Businesses in Nepal that need to track attendance and run payroll for office staff, retail chains with multiple branches, and field teams (sales, delivery, service technicians, security) who work away from a fixed location.

## Pricing

- **Free**: Unlimited employees, mobile QR clock-in, roster, 30-day history.
- **Standard (NPR 99/employee/month)**: Geo-fencing, leave management, reports & export, unlimited history.
- **Professional (NPR 149/employee/month)**: Automatic payroll & payslips, SSF/CIT/TDS, multi-site, field-staff tracking.

No setup fee. Annual billing includes two months free.

## Platforms

- Web dashboard (admin, branch admin, accountant, employee roles)
- Mobile app for staff (clock in/out, view personal info)
- Mobile app for admins (monitor attendance and live field-staff locations)

## Company

Attend Xpress is a product of Zentara Labs, based in Kathmandu, Nepal.
Contact: support@zentaralabs.com · +977 9761154213
